summary: Light/Dark mode theme fix verification complete. All tested pages display correctly in both light and dark modes. CSS variables properly applied, theme toggle works, text is readable with proper contrast in both modes.

light_mode.homepage: PASS - Light background (#f8f9fa), dark text (#111827), map visible, stats bar shows data
light_mode.leaderboard: PASS - Table readable, 524 rows, channel names visible, green/red growth indicators work
light_mode.countries: PASS - Country cards visible with flags, channel counts, borders visible
light_mode.channel_page: PASS - MrBeast page readable, stats cards visible, chart visible, growth in green
light_mode.trending: PASS - Two columns visible, channel names readable, growth percentages in green
light_mode.compare: PASS - Search input has visible border (1px solid), placeholder visible
light_mode.blog: PASS - Blog posts visible, category badges visible, 14 articles found
light_mode.top_youtube_channels: PASS - SEO page readable, stats cards visible, channel list readable
light_mode.about: PASS - All sections readable, feature cards visible with icons
light_mode.footer: PASS - Light gray bg, dark text, all links visible, newsletter input has border

dark_mode.homepage: PASS - Dark background (#0a0a0a), white text, map with dark background
dark_mode.leaderboard: PASS - Dark table, white text readable, growth indicators visible
dark_mode.countries: PASS - Dark cards, white text, flags visible
dark_mode.footer: PASS - Dark background, white text readable

theme_toggle.toggle_functionality: PASS - Clicking toggles between light and dark correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Light/dark mode theme system working correctly. CSS variables defined in /app/frontend/src/index.css with :root for light mode and [data-theme='dark'] for dark mode. Theme toggle uses data-testid='theme-toggle' and persists to localStorage key 'toptube_theme'. All pages (homepage, leaderboard, countries, channel, trending, compare, blog, top-youtube-channels, about) display correctly in both modes with proper text contrast and visible borders.
